title: Consensus update on diagnostic criteria for endometrial carcinoma subtyping in surgical pathology
abstract: This consensus statement reviews histopathology, immunohistochemistry, molecular pathology, grading, staging, and reporting recommendations for endometrial carcinoma subtyping in diagnostic surgical pathology.

title: External validation of artificial intelligence for mitotic count assessment on whole slide imaging
abstract: A multicenter validation study evaluated deep learning image analysis for mitotic count assessment in surgical pathology whole slide imaging and reported interobserver agreement with pathologists.

title: New immunohistochemistry panel improves classification of diagnostically difficult soft tissue tumors
abstract: This cohort study assessed immunohistochemistry and molecular pathology markers for soft tissue pathology classification and highlighted limitations requiring external validation.

title: A multicenter randomized trial of point-of-care C-reactive protein testing for acute cough in primary care
abstract: This randomized trial evaluated whether point-of-care C-reactive protein testing in primary care reduced antibiotic prescribing for patients with acute cough without increasing reconsultation or adverse events.

title: A preprint describing a tumor-agnostic companion diagnostic for targeted therapy selection
abstract: This preprint reports a molecularly selected tumor-agnostic companion diagnostic associated with pathologic response to targeted therapy. Peer review and prospective validation are required.

title: MicroRNA signature for early-stage non-small cell lung cancer using FFPE tissue and qRT-PCR
abstract: This cohort study assessed a microRNA signature in FFPE tumor tissue from patients with early-stage non-small cell lung cancer and reported diagnostic accuracy requiring external validation.

title: Murine cell line model of a rare signaling pathway
abstract: This in vitro cell line study in mice explores a signaling pathway with unclear clinical relevance.

title: External validation of artificial intelligence for mitotic count assessment on whole slide imaging
